name: Jamaican Meat Patties
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
PASTRY
Combine 2 cups all-purpose flour with 1/2 teaspoon turmeric and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Add shortening or butter (cold, diced) and mix until in tiny pieces. Gradually add ice water or more if necessary, forming a ball. Roll out to about 1/4 inch thickness and cut into 4-inch circles. Gather remaining dough and lightly shape again. Place about 1 tablespoon filling on each circle. Brush edges with lightly beaten egg, fold over and seal.
Heat oil in a large heavy skillet. Add onions and garlic; cook, stirring until onion wilts. Add ground meat; cook, stirring until meat is browned and combined with onions. Sprinkle with curry powder, salt, and black pepper. Cook about 5 minutes. Stir in bread crumbs and stock or water. Cook, stirring often, about 20 minutes. Mixture should be thick but not dry. Stir in green onions.
Preheat oven to 400°F. Place patties on cookie sheets lined with aluminum foil. Brush lightly with remaining beaten egg. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes until browned. Makes approximately 30 patties. These can be made ahead and frozen.
